title: Chatsworth Love Your Lawn Grass Seed, Ready To Use, 500 G, Clear
features: CHATSWORTH LOVE YOUR LAWN, ALL IN ONE GRASS SEED, INCL FERTILISER, READY TO USE, EASILY GROW LUSH GREEN GRASS:

QUICK GERMINATION & GROWTH: Chatsworth Love Your Lawn Grass Seed, a combination of grass seeds and lawn fertiliser. Coated seeds, ensures rapid germination, producing a thicker greener lawn. Apply March to October once frost has passed.

THICK, HEALTHY LAWN: Chatsworth Love Your Lawn Grass Seed, is formulated to germinate quickly after application with a low level of water required to produce strong roots and a healthier greener looking lawn.

READY TO USE, RAKE GROUND & APPLY SEED: Prepare the area to be treated. Remove weeds, rake to remove debris including dead grass and small stones. Ensure the ground is level, sprinkle Chatsworth Love Your Lawn, All In One Grass seed using the side dispenser area of the box. Gently rake the seeds into the soil, water. Depending upon the weather, water at the end of a very hot, dry day to ensure growth continues.
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: Chatsworth Love Your Lawn, All In One Grass Seed. Store in a cool, dry place out of direct sunlight. Ready to use 500g Box
